title: Replace hero image with MP4 video on Zurich couples landing page

requirements.text: On the ZurichCouplesLandingPage (frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx), replace the hero/entry image with an HTML5 video player that plays the uploaded MP4 video file. The video should be placed at frontend/public/assets/videos/hero-paarberatung-zuerich.mp4. The video element should autoplay, be muted, loop, and be fully responsive (object-fit: cover), matching the dimensions and layout of the existing hero image it replaces.

quotes: Ich hätte das angehängte Video gerne anstelle der Einstiegsbilds auch der paarberatung-Zuerich seite.

acceptanceCriteria: The hero image on the Zurich couples landing page is no longer visible.
An MP4 video plays automatically (muted, looping) in the hero section where the image previously appeared.
The video is responsive and covers the same area as the previous hero image on all screen sizes.
The video file is served from frontend/public/assets/videos/hero-paarberatung-zuerich.mp4.
No layout shifts or broken UI elements occur on the Zurich landing page.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Video must be served as a static asset from the frontend public directory, not through the backend.
Only the ZurichCouplesLandingPage hero section should be changed; all other pages remain unaffected.
nonGoals: Adding video to any other page.
Implementing video upload functionality through the admin UI.
Adding video controls or a play/pause button.
